title: brachypodium sylvaticum var. wattii
intro: Brachypodium sylvaticum var. wattii, also known as Welsh grass or rough-stalked brachypodium, is a subspecies of the perennial grass species Brachypodium sylvaticum. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving wound healing. The herbal preparations of Brachypodium sylvaticum var. wattii include infusions and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
